## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-04-19 — do not edit manually*

### Project Structure
*~8,000 tokens/session saved*
- There are TWO canvas/rendering hierarchies: `src/components/canvas/` (newer, with design system) and `src/components/` + `src/visuals/` (older/legacy). Be aware of both when searching for components.
- Key files: `src/components/canvas/design/DesignTokens.ts`, `src/components/canvas/HexGrid.tsx`, `src/components/canvas/Scene.tsx`, `src/components/canvas/EntityFactory.tsx`, `src/components/canvas/design/VisualRegistry.ts`, `src/components/Stage.tsx`, `src/components/HexMap.tsx`

### Build & Dependencies
*~3,000 tokens/session saved*
- Build command: `npm run build 2>&1 | tail -30` (Next.js 16.2.4 with Turbopack)
- `lucide-react` was not pre-installed; if HUD or UI components use it, run `npm install lucide-react` first.
- `postprocessing` package may not be installed; verify with `ls node_modules | grep postprocessing` before importing.

### Editor Rules
*~1,500 tokens/session saved*
- Always `Read` a file before using `Edit` on it — the tool will error with "File has not been read yet" if you skip this step.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
